latin: Vir nudis pedibus per vitrum fractum ambulavit ut uxorem servaret. cum hostem superavisset, per radiophonum dixit: 'io io festivitas, malefice!'

questions.prompt: Why was the man walking on broken glass?
What does he say after defeating his enemy?

translation: A man walked barefoot through broken glass to save his wife. When he had defeated his enemy, he said over the radio: 'Yippee ki yay, villain!'
